docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,211.57 FILED BY NCMG GROUP INC DBA NEW CENTURY MARBLE & GRANITE AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, KENNETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: MING KO APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF NCMG GROUP INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH HSU IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINRD. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MING KO, ACCOUNT MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCMG GROUP INC DBA NEW CENTURY MARBLE & GRANITE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NCMG GROUP INC DBA NEW CENTURY MARBLE & GRANITE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HSU, KENNETH $2,811.58 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,861.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, KENNETH
